causal_summary: [Mock Insight Mode Enabled] Causal Inference Summary: historical revenue growth ($427,858 projected over 90 days) is concentrated in Google Ads, which accounts for 94.2% of forecast channel revenue at 5.66x ROAS - see the Explainability tab for the full SHAP-ranked channel and campaign contributions. Blended ROAS (2.40x) is most sensitive to Meta Ads, which carries the widest 90-day ROAS forecast interval of the active channels (519% of its own P50 value) - a swing there moves the blended number the most. Within that mix, PERFORMANCE_MAX is the largest single campaign-type driver, accounting for 45.2% of forecast revenue at 3.98x ROAS - the Explainability tab's SHAP breakdown traces exactly how much of Google Ads's share above is carried by this campaign type versus the rest of its mix.
